items.title: South African oppressive or prejudicial conduct framework
items.text: Check for conduct affecting a recognized member, shareholder, or director interest; grounded prejudice or unfairness; and a court-facing remedy that fits the Companies Act rather than a generalized grievance narrative.

items.title: South African password or access-code misuse framework
items.text: Check whether the password, access code, or similar data are identified, whether possession or use was unlawful and intentional, and whether the conduct was linked to unlawful access, interference, fraud, or forgery under the Cybercrimes Act.

items.title: South African corruption framing
items.text: Check for a gratification or inducement, a decision or omission procured through that inducement, and a legal-duty or trust breach that grounds the corruption theory instead of leaving it as vague suspicion.
